subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up from the conference! We'd be happy to schedule a 30-minute meeting to explore potential collaboration.

Next week, we have the following slots available:
- Tuesday, April 2 from 10:30 AM to 11:00 AM UTC
- Wednesday, April 3 from 2:30 PM to 3:00 PM UTC
- Thursday, April 4 from 9:30 AM to 10:00 AM UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for you, and we'll send a calendar invite with the meeting link.

Regarding the contact details you requested, we don't share direct contact information for our team members externally. We'll be happy to introduce you to the relevant technical leaders from our side once we've had our initial discussion and aligned on the scope of potential collaboration.

Looking forward to speaking with you!

Best regards,
[Your Team]
